feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing below error Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing below error in Standard Replication iFlow in SAP CPI.

Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query failed with message "NullPointerException:while trying to invoke the method org.apache.catalina.TomcatPrincipal.getUserPrincipal() of a null object loaded from field org.apache.catalina.connector.Request.userPrincipal of an object loaded from local variable 'this'"

Please advice on the root cause and any steps need to be taken?

entry.title: Employee Central: hide the effective date
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Please, how to hide the "effective as of" from some users:

entry.title: SuccessFactors Mashup Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) to SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll (ECP) setup for Canada payroll. When we try to save changes in Tax/Garnishment infotypes from EC to ECP using the standard mashup screen in EC, the system displays an error message '500 Internal Server Error. A request for server was sent to server'. See attached error message description.

We reviewed the resolution under SAP note 2887555, but there is no '#same-site-by-default-cookies' option available to review and disable in chrome and microsoft edge browsers.

Has anyone encountered this issue in the past or currently using mashups without any issues?

Thanks,

Mitesh

entry.title: Why can I find an employee/user in "hire date correction" field but not elsewhere in EC?
entry.content:
UPDATE: issue is solved. 

Missing the right permissions was the issue. I had to use DRTM master data with first soft and then hard purge the user. After doing this, the user no longer existed in the search-bar for hire-date.

 

I have a strange situation, where I need to delete a user from EC, because the flow from recruiting to onboarding did not go smooth, due to change of hire date in the future. The employee had initially start date February 1, but the actual first day was February 10. Somehow my team managed to change the hiring-date from 2/1/2025 to 2/10/2025, but then the employee "disappeared" in EC.

We searched after the employee in recruiting, org.chart, search-bar, onboarding and reporting, but we could not find the person until we used "hire date correction" - then the employees name showed but without much data. 

We now want to start the process from scratch with this employee (meaning creating the employee again), but first we must delete the persons data entirely from EC. Due to error message from SF stating "employee data already exists", when we try to create the employee again, this is not possible.

To sum up: How can we delete this persons data for good, when we can't find the employee in purge/data retention management?

entry.title: Employee Central source of data
entry.content:
Hello 

I am not familiar on SAP Success factor Employee Central, I just want to know where the records in employee central coming from is it connected to SAP ECC/S4HANA database/tables?

entry.title: Requirement Gathering Questionnare for SAP SuccessFactors SP
entry.content:
Dear all,

Do you have list of questions that should be asked by SAP SuccessFactors Consultants to implement Succession Planning? Please list here asap.

 

Thanks

entry.title: SuccessFactors Employee Central integration with third party Payroll
entry.content:
Hi Expect,

We recently integrated Employee Central, our core HR system, with a third-party payroll system, which is not SAP Employee Central payroll. We are facing massive problems, can you help indicate the appropriate Implementation guide for third-party payroll reference from SAP?

We are using the Replication of Employee Data from SAP ERP HCM to employee central using SAP cloud integration as Middleware.

Regards

Carolina

entry.title: How to write the formula in Bus rule where the notice PD is >6 months even for 6months and 1 day?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to put in place where the notice period duration for a country is 1 month if the employee tenure/duration in the company is more than 6 months, ie 6 months and 1 day also. If tenure is less than 6 months into the organization, then the notice period should be 1 week.
While using the predefined function "get the number of months between start and end dates", where my start date is hire date and end date is current date, then the function behaves like if the tenure in company is equal to 6 or <6 months then the notice period is picked up as defined ie. 1 week.

 

When the duration is more than 6 months, then the function will consider the 1 month notice period only if the month has passed. Ex: if tenure is 6 months and 5 days, then the function picks up the 1 week condition. If the tenure is 7 months (post 6 months), then it considers the current condition or 1 month condition. 

now my problem is, even if the tenure is 6 months and 2 days, the 1 month condition should be picked up and not 1 week. 

Request anyone to help me on this issue. Business people are surprised on listening to the way SF is calculating the number of months. We should have an option to input decimal value also in Business rule similar to number. Kindly help if anyone has been able to implement similar requirement.

Regards,

Nagavalli B n

entry.title: Work permit alert expiration rule issue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I was trying to create a business rule to trigger an alert notification and send an email to inform HR that an employee’s Work Permit in Singapore will expire in 30 days and 60 days.

For this purpose, I created the following rule:

However, after reviewing the workflow and the alert message, HR only receives the alert when the Work Permit expiration date is two months before. The second condition for 30 days is being skipped.
In Manage Alerts & Notifications, the 30-day alert remains pending.

I tried a different approach, and my concern is whether this approach is correct, using a date plus condition in the "IF" clause:



With this second approach, HR receives both alerts for 30 days and 60 days, and the alert creation date and alert effective date remain the same (as of today, during testing).

Could you please provide your expertise and guidance?

Thank you!

entry.title: SSO Certificate Renewal process for SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

My customer is using Grand ID as a IDP to login to SAP SuccessFactors. As per Deprecation of SAP SuccessFactors Single Sign-On Certificate | SAP Help Portal SSO certificate will expire soon.

I followed Renewal of SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite Single-Sig... - SAP Community and tried updating the SSO certificate in IDP but system shows an error as below, I followed below steps -

 

Step 1- Went to Public API url and found the latest SSO certificate -  

 

Step 2- Went to Grand ID IDP site and copy pasted the above in certificate place.

 

1-Please let me know if this is correct process, Also do i need to upload OR  copy paste the above certificate in IDP

2-If i ask the customer to migrate to IAS then what is the process & will customer be able to use both Grand ID and IAS together.

I am positing this question after asking SAP about this.

 

SAP has told me that problem is from IDP side only

entry.title: PaymentInformation upsert in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central through CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I have to update the bank details coming in a csv file to PaymentInformation portlet in Successfactors Employee Central to an entity PaymentInformationDetailV3.

We are receiving all the details except external code from source system. The external code is a key field in the PaymentInformationDetailV3, So I am unable to update the information with the below error.

PaymentInformationDetailV3 Upsert Failed for empId: 00002. Error msg: bad valueString [] as part of keyString [PaymentInformationV3_effectiveStartDate=datetime'2025-01-03T00%3A00%3A00',PaymentInformationV3_worker='00002',externalCode=]"

I have checked the below KBA's as well.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3000179
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002990468

The external code is an autogenerated field in Employee central, When the SF EC consultant update the information manually through import templates the external code is auto generated.

Please let me know how this field external code is to be mapped in sap cpi .

Regards,

Ramya

entry.title: Handling ONB2.0 rehires in SailPoint
entry.content:
Dear All,

My customer has SailPoint as the Identity Provisioning agent for the Company Idp (Azure AD). After activating ONB2.0, customer had to update a lot of logics and build was somewhat a rebuilt in SailPoint. Rehire scenario was one of the pain points. If the rehire date was in the past and the ONB activity was not completed, Employee Status from EC picks up as active. This means Old employee record gets activated before the actual hire in EC. According to the KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3414839 -this is standard behavior. 

One more thing: SailPoint uses CompoundEmployee API and Odata API. They are unable to put a filter using both APIs.

Has anyone experienced this issue and how did you overcome it?

SAP SuccessFactors Platform , SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding , SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central , API

entry.title: Succession Planning with concurrent employment
entry.content: How do we implement succession planning when we have concurrent employment in place in sap successfactors?

entry.title: SuccessFactors New People profile - Questions
entry.content:
We are setting up the new people profile and have not been able to find any information on the following:

1. Defaulting employees to the Company Profile and not the Full Profile when they search for someone.  

2. On the Full Profile , employees with no access to see other employee's banking information in RBP see the Banking Card on Personal Information even they do not have access to other employees banking information.   Can this banking card only be given to certain groups like HR?

entry.title: contingent worker still active (work order ended)
entry.content: the work order was ended but job information status still active. how can I terminate this?

entry.title: Create an alert for one pay component recurring
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We do need to create an alert for one pay component recurring. The alert should get triggered, if the pay component value get changed or deleted.

We tried to do this with several different business rules, in compensation information as well as in pay component recurring. We tried to get the change of the pay component directly, as well as to put this one pay component in one pay component group and ask for the original value of the pay component group.

However, the result was never satisfying - either with the paycomponent directly, neither with the paycomponent group. The alert does get triggerd for every change in pay component recurring, even if another pay component was changed, or the alert was never triggered. We were not able to build a rule, which iternates through all pay components and only looks at the one pay component. 

We tried to use the function carindality () as well, but also this function hasnt lead to the expected behaviour. 

Has anyone experience with alerts for specific pay components? 

Thank you so much!

Kind regards

entry.title: Customizable/ Custom Fields 01-15
entry.content:
Summary: How are Custom Fields 01-15 mapped? 

In our implementation instance provided by SAP, some users have dates set for Custom01, other details for Custom05, but I cannot tell how it is there, and why some users only have it.

How can I put details into these custom01, custom02 fields? 

For example, I would like to like to place/copy "First Name" into Custom01. I cannot tell how I can do this in the Admin Portal/Settings.

Any advice would be appreciated.

entry.title: how to delete an overdue task in successfactors under "For you today"
entry.content:
I have a query
Need to delete an overdue task which has been sitting under "for you today" for past 30+ days.

That task has already been completed on time.

Is there a way that I can get rid of it?

Thanks

entry.title: People Storie positions only of bosses
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, I hope you are doing well.

I wanted to ask you if you have had the experience of how you can create a report in people storie where you can only bring the positions that are higher level, without bringing me on which positions have subordinates. I am currently building a report, but it brings me all the subordinates of the top level position.

I would appreciate if you can share with me some ideas on how I can achieve this since it is a very important report for our organization where we can identify which positions are bosses.

Regards

entry.title: Deprecation of Legacy org chart and Profile preview and spotlight becoming universal
entry.content:
Hi All

Can someone please confirm if customers need to migrate to Latest org chart in H1 2025 which comes along with Profile preview and spotlight?

Is the latest org chart, spotlight and profile preview becoming universal in H1 2025? The help.com link says that the legacy org chart will be deleted in Nov 2025 which means the latest one should go universal in H2 2025 right?

SAP are saying the spotlight and profile preview will be universal in H1 2025. Don't both these features come as part of latest org chart which has a deletion date of Nov 2025? Quiet confused as to when the latest org chart will become universal along with spotlight and profile preview

SAP links are here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/239ca4e239ef48378073693a2a18167c.html?locale=en-US&parentHref=%2Fwhats-new%2F8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885%3FProduct%3DPlatform%26Version%3D1H%25202024%26locale%3Den-US%23top&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What%27s%20New

If someone has clarity, please shed some light

Regards

Mahwish
